title: Gonmore

{{Quote|You know as well as I do that Karrde's got a sector clearinghouse over on Gonmore. They'll have all the credits there we need.|Jerf Huxley, to Mara Jade Skywalker|<ref name="Survivor" />}}
'''Gonmore''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Irishi sector/Legends|Irishi sector]] and on the [[Entralla Route/Legends|Entralla Route]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]]. At one point a part of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], by [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]] it hosted a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] clearinghouse for the [[Car'das/Legends|smuggling organization]] led by [[Talon Karrde]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Jerf Huxley]] unsuccessfully attempted to force Karrde's former second-in-command, [[Mara Jade Skywalker]], to arrange for a large sum of [[Currency/Legends|money]] to be transferred to him from the Gonmore clearinghouse as severance pay for Karrde ending the employment of Huxley and his own [[Huxlings|smuggling group]].

==Description==
Gonmore was a terrestrial<ref name="Survivor" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE Gonmore">{{CSWECite|I|352|Gonmore}}</ref> situated in the [[Gonmore system/Legends|Gonmore system]], a part of the [[Irishi sector/Legends|Irishi sector]]<ref name="EGTW" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="NewTerritories" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It was located on the [[Entralla Route/Legends|Entralla Route]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]], which linked it to the [[Obredaan system/Legends|Obredaan]] and [[Ord Tessebok system/Legends|Ord Tessebok systems]],<ref name="EGTW" /> and it lay relatively close to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] planet [[Domgrin]].<ref name="CSWE Domgrin">{{CSWECite|I|196|Domgrin}}</ref>

==History==
{{Quote|You're going to call and tell them to bring it to us. Half a million. Now.|Jerf Huxley, to Mara Jade Skywalker|<ref name="Survivor" />}}
[[File:TalonKarrde-ERC.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Gonmore hosted a sector clearinghouse for the smuggling network led by Talon Karrde.]]
Gonmore was a part of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] between [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] and [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]].<ref name="EGTW" /> It was believed to be the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Talon Karrde]]'s primary financial base for the Outer Rim Territories,<ref name="CSWE Gonmore" /> and, by [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]],<ref name="22 ABY">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> his [[Car'das/Legends|smuggling network]] maintained a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] clearinghouse there—the existence of which was known to the network's member [[Jerf Huxley]] and, according to him, [[Mara Jade Skywalker]], Karrde's former<ref name="Survivor" /> second-in-command.<ref name="CSWE Mara">{{CSWECite|III|166|Skywalker, Mara Jade}}</ref>

That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], Jade Skywalker met with Huxley at an Outer Rim [[Jerf Huxley's cantina|cantina]] that was under the control of the latter's own [[Huxlings|smuggling group]] in order to notify him, on Karrde's behalf, that his organization's services would no longer be required due to Karrde gradually leaving the smuggling business. In response, Huxley—whom Jade Skywalker believed had suspected the coming of that news—demanded, while holding her at gunpoint, that she contact the clearinghouse on Gonmore and arrange for the transportation to him and his group of five hundred thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] in cash as a form of severance pay. Ultimately, however, Jade Skywalker, with the assistance of her [[Marriage/Legends|husband]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], forced Huxley to let them leave unharmed, noting that she would instead transfer twenty thousand credits to his account as a thank you from Karrde for Huxley's [[Standard decade/Legends|decade]] of service to his organization.<ref name="Survivor" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Sqcover.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Gonmore was introduced in ''Survivor's Quest''.]]
Gonmore was first mentioned in the [[2004]] novel ''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' by [[Timothy Zahn]].<ref name="Survivor" /> [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' established that Gonmore was situated in the Outer Rim Territories,<ref name="CSWE Gonmore" /> a placement that was subsequently supported by the Appendix section of the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''—which placed the Gonmore [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Gonmore itself, in grid square K-6—but also contradicted by multiple maps in that same book that instead placed it in the Mid Rim.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Gonmore system/Legends|Gonmore system]]</ref>

The Appendix's Outer Rim claim was then repeated in the [[StarWars.com]] [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|Online Companion]] to ''The Essential Atlas'', which furthermore stated the system was a part of the [[Fath sector/Legends|Fath sector]],<ref name="EAOC" /> but later refuted by the Online Companion feature "[https://web.archive.org/web/20170713024921/http://www.starwars.com/news/essential-atlas-extra-sectors-of-the-mid-rim Essential Atlas Extra: Sectors of the Mid Rim]," which once again placed the Gonmore system in the Mid Rim, this time as part of the Irishi sector.<ref name="Mid Rim">{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-extra-sectors-of-the-mid-rim|text=Essential Atlas Extra: Sectors of the Mid Rim}}</ref> Since the [[2012]] reference book ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' eventually also repeated the Mid-Rim-and-Irishi-sector placement, this article treats it as correct.<ref name="EGTW" />
